quizes.title: Greetings & Introductions
quizes.description: Test your knowledge of basic greetings, farewells, family vocabulary, and simple sentences with like, speak, drink and eat.

questions.q: Which greeting means "Bom dia!" in English?

How do you say "Eu falo português" in English?
How do you say "Eu gosto de beber leite" in English?

quizes.title: Work, Need & Negation
quizes.description: Practice the verbs work, need, play and study. Includes negation with don't, articles a / an, and everyday vocabulary.

questions.q: "I don't work." — "don't" is used to:

"A cup of coffee" — what is "cup" in Portuguese?
"Você trabalha com sua irmã." in English is:
How do you say "Eu não gosto de estudar" in English?
options: I am not liking to study.

questions.q: "To play the piano" — which article is used with musical instruments?
"Amanhã" in English is:
Which sentence is correct?
"A glass of water" — "glass" in Portuguese means:

quizes.title: Can / Can't — Abilities
quizes.description: Express ability and inability using can / can't with everyday activity vocabulary.

quizes.title: Daily Routines
quizes.description: Present simple quiz focused on daily routines, time expressions, and frequency adverbs.

quizes.title: Past Simple — Regular Verbs
quizes.description: Form past simple sentences with regular verbs. Includes affirmative, negative, and questions.

quizes.title: Irregular Verbs Challenge
quizes.description: Match 20 common irregular verbs to their past tense forms.

quizes.title: Present Perfect vs Past Simple
quizes.description: Choose the correct tense: present perfect or past simple in context.

quizes.title: Future: Will vs Going To
quizes.description: Identify whether to use will or going to based on context and speaker intention.

quizes.title: Conditionals 1 & 2
quizes.description: First and second conditional sentence completion and error correction.
